testcase.name: test_screenshot_with_tiny_jpeg
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loveassist_backend.py:175: in test_screenshot_with_tiny_jpeg assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - litellm.BadRequestError: AnthropicException - {\"type\":\"error\",\"error\":{\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\",\"message\":\"Could not process image\"},\"request_id\":\"req_011CbrZuz26XWCcgctieRFKy\"}. Received Model Group=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\nAvailable Model Group Fallbacks=None"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
